description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:slim Docker image, with a global before_script that runs cargo --version and a cache of the target directory. Define two stages in order: test then build. Add a Test job in the test stage that runs cargo test. Add a Build job in the build stage that runs only for tags, executes cargo build --release then copies the resulting binary to the project root, and publishes the scribe file as an artifact. Ensure the cache persists the target directory across jobs.
